response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior full-stack engineer with strong testing discipline, GIS exposure through GISCollective, and some low-latency systems work at Sociomantic using D. However, the role specifically requires modern C++ or Rust experience, and the resume shows only brief C/C++ work over a decade ago at National Instruments and a bachelor thesis. No Rust, no recent systems-level pipeline work, and no demonstrated experience with routing tiles or navigation guidance. Could be a stretch hire if the team values geospatial background and is open to ramp-up on C++.
strengths: Genuine geospatial/GIS background via GISCollective and Green Map work
Low-latency, high-throughput service experience at Sociomantic (millions of requests/sec)
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing tooling
concerns: No modern C++ or Rust experience — primary stack is TS/Node/D
No navigation guidance or routing pipeline experience
Recent roles are product/web-focused, not systems or data-pipeline engineering
